name: aitx-community-newsletter-digest-actor-1
title: AITX Community Newsletter Digest Actor 1
description: Scrapes articles from RSS feeds and direct URLs, and events from Lu.ma and Meetup, outputting a unified dataset for the AITX Community Newsletter Pipeline. Actor 1 of a 2-actor pipeline.

meta.purpose: Multi-actor newsletter pipeline for the AI/TX community
meta.pipeline: Actor 1 of 2 — data collection and scraping stage
